author: Aditya Krishnan Mohan
name: XSA7 BigramHash ValueResidual TTT 1.1227
blurb: 11-layer parameter-banking GPT with XSA on 7 layers, BigramHash(2048)+TrigramHash(1024), ValueResidual, ValueEmbedding at layers 5/9/10, int6+lzma compression, and legal score-first TTT (4 epochs); 3-seed mean legal_ttt_val_bpb=1.12327 under 16MB artifact cap.
